## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked issue

Closes #

PRs should come from an issue. For small maintainer-only release/documentation updates, explain why an issue is not needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release / CI / maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] Backend: `ruff check api tests`
- [ ] Backend: `pytest`
- [ ] Frontend: `npm --prefix ui-src run typecheck`
- [ ] Frontend: `npm --prefix ui-src run build`
- [ ] Shell: `bash -n vox.sh setup.sh scripts/*.sh pkg-scripts/*`
- [ ] Manual app test, if UI/runtime behavior changed

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, request IDs, or migration notes when useful.
